body: Hey, just a heads up—I noticed you didn't send in your weekly status doc yesterday. I know Fridays get crazy, but your manager mentioned last week that she really needs these submitted on time. Want me to give you a nudge before the deadline next week so you don't have to scramble?
snippet: Hey, just a heads up—I noticed you didn't send in your weekly status doc yesterd...
subject: Weekly status doc reminder

body: You're right, my bad. I got swamped with that client meeting and completely spaced on it. I'll set a reminder on my calendar for Thursday mornings so I don't forget again. Thanks for catching that—I appreciate you keeping me on track.
snippet: You're right, my bad. I got swamped with that client meeting and completely spac...
subject: Re: Weekly status doc reminder

body: Hey, are you free for lunch tomorrow? I was thinking of trying that new sandwich place downtown that just opened. Looks pretty good from the photos. Let me know what works for you!
snippet: Hey, are you free for lunch tomorrow? I was thinking of trying that new sandwich...
subject: Lunch tomorrow?

body: Yeah, I can do lunch tomorrow. That sandwich place sounds great. What time were you thinking? I have a meeting at 2 but I'm free before that.
snippet: Yeah, I can do lunch tomorrow. That sandwich place sounds great. What time were ...
subject: Re: Lunch tomorrow?

body: Perfect! How about noon? That should give us plenty of time. I'll make a reservation if they take them. See you then!
snippet: Perfect! How about noon? That should give us plenty of time. I'll make a reserva...
subject: Re: Lunch tomorrow?

body: Hi Henry, I got the preliminary sketches from the architect for the kitchen renovation. They look great, but I'd really like to get your thoughts before we move forward. Can you take a look at the files I emailed you this morning? Let me know what you think about the layout and the color schemes they proposed. I'm thinking we should probably schedule a call with them next week to discuss. Thanks! Karen
snippet: Hi Henry, I got the preliminary sketches from the architect for the kitchen reno...
subject: Design review request

body: Hi Karen, I just reviewed the sketches and overall I'm impressed with what they came up with. The island layout looks good and should give us the extra counter space we wanted. My only concern is the proposed lighting fixture above the island—it seems a bit too modern for the style we talked about. Also, I'm not sure about the warm gray they picked for the walls. Could we see some alternatives? The cabinets and backsplash look great though. Let's definitely schedule that call. Henry
snippet: Hi Karen, I just reviewed the sketches and overall I'm impressed with what they ...
subject: Re: Design review request

body: Good points about the lighting! I had the same thought actually. I'll send the architect your feedback about the fixture and ask for some more traditional options. As for the wall color, I see what you mean—maybe we could look at something more like that soft taupe we saw at the paint store last month? That felt right when we were standing in the kitchen. I'll compile all our notes and send them over before we hop on the call with them. Thanks for taking the time to review! Karen
snippet: Good points about the lighting! I had the same thought actually. I'll send the a...
subject: Re: Design review request

body: Yes, the taupe would be perfect. That's exactly what I was thinking too. I'm glad we're on the same page here. I've got availability next Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon if the architect can make either of those work. Let me know what time works and I'll block it off. Sounds like we're getting close to something we both really love. Henry
snippet: Yes, the taupe would be perfect. That's exactly what I was thinking too. I'm gla...
subject: Re: Design review request

body: Hi Henry, I know we talked about taking a long weekend in the mountains sometime soon. I was thinking we could do July 18-21 if that works with your schedule. I found a nice cabin rental near Aspen that's available those dates and it's reasonably priced. Can you let me know if those dates are clear for you at work? I'll need to book soon since availability is filling up fast. -Karen
snippet: Hi Henry, I know we talked about taking a long weekend in the mountains sometime...
subject: Trip logistics for July

body: July 18-21 works great! I already blocked it off on my calendar. The Aspen cabin sounds perfect. Go ahead and book it. I was also thinking we should sort out flights while you're at it - do you want to fly out on the 18th or drive? If we fly, I can book those as soon as you send me the cabin confirmation. Let me know what you prefer. Henry
snippet: July 18-21 works great! I already blocked it off on my calendar. The Aspen cabin...
subject: Re: Trip logistics for July

body: Perfect! I just booked the cabin - confirmation #47283 emailed to both of us. Flying makes sense since it's about 10 hours driving. How about we look at flights departing Friday morning, July 18th and returning Monday evening the 21st? That way we get the full weekend. Also, we'll need to arrange a rental car or arrange transport from the airport. I can handle the car rental if you want to book the flights. -Karen
snippet: Perfect! I just booked the cabin - confirmation #47283 emailed to both of us. Fl...
subject: Re: Trip logistics for July

body: Got the cabin confirmation, thanks for handling that. I'll book flights for Friday morning and Monday evening today. I'm looking at departures around 8-9am on the 18th which gets us there by noon. For the car rental, I can grab that if you want - do we want to upgrade to something nicer or keep it basic? Also, should we make any restaurant reservations ahead of time or just play it by ear? Henry
snippet: Got the cabin confirmation, thanks for handling that. I'll book flights for Frid...
subject: Re: Trip logistics for July

body: Those flight times look good. For the car, let's keep it basic - maybe just something reliable with good mountain clearance in case we do any hiking. I actually looked up a few restaurants and there's this farm-to-table place that has amazing reviews. They book up fast so I'd recommend trying to get a reservation if you can. I'll send you the details. One more thing - don't forget we need to pack hiking boots and layers since it gets cold up there. This is going to be so good! -Karen
snippet: Those flight times look good. For the car, let's keep it basic - maybe just some...
subject: Re: Trip logistics for July

body: Henry, did you see the email from the homeowner's insurance company? Our policy renewal notice came through and it's due by the end of the month. The premium went up again. Can you look at it when you get a chance? I'm wondering if we should shop around this year instead of just renewing with them like usual.
snippet: Henry, did you see the email from the homeowner's insurance company? Our policy ...
subject: Service renewal

body: I'll check it tonight. Yeah, I saw the email come through yesterday. Last renewal they bumped it up about 8% too. I've been meaning to get quotes from a couple other places anyway. I think State Farm had a decent rate last I looked. I'll do some digging this week and we can talk about it this weekend over coffee.
snippet: I'll check it tonight. Yeah, I saw the email come through yesterday. Last renewa...
subject: Re: Service renewal

body: Hey, just saw your calendar block for Friday night. Is that when the big auth system switch is happening? I wanted to make sure I'm not scheduling anything for that evening. Also, should I be worried about it affecting anything on my end?
snippet: Hey, just saw your calendar block for Friday night. Is that when the big auth sy...
subject: auth cutover plan

body: Yes, Friday 10pm-11pm is the maintenance window. We're migrating to the new OAuth provider. You shouldn't see any issues—I've tested it thoroughly and set up fallback routes just in case. I might be monitoring it for a bit after, but it should be straightforward. I'll text you if anything goes sideways.
snippet: Yes, Friday 10pm-11pm is the maintenance window. We're migrating to the new OAut...
subject: Re: auth cutover plan

body: Sounds good. Just don't pull another all-nighter like last time. You need sleep more than you need to stare at logs. I'll leave some coffee in the fridge anyway. Good luck with it—you've got this.
snippet: Sounds good. Just don't pull another all-nighter like last time. You need sleep ...
